label: Recommendation
desc: Make a case and land a decision — the answer first, the evidence, then the ask.
note: The heart of the library: pyramid-principle persuasion. Lead with the executive summary (C02), defend it with action-title evidence (C05) and an option comparison (C15) scored on a scorecard (C16), close with the ask (C30). C08 waterfall sharpens the value case once its converter exhibit ships.
